title: Space Science Institute
description: The Space Science Institute serves as Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory's hub for advancing space science, focusing on mission concepts, technology development, and cross-disciplinary research in astrophysics, planetary science, and instrumentation. It aims to address key questions about dark energy, planetary origins, and space security through innovative collaboration and a legacy of excellence in exploration technology.
text:
Featured research
The intersection of physics, optical engineering, and control systems expertise at LLNL—as well as decades of previous research—is furthering exoplanet science. Leveraging LLNL-developed advanced adaptive optics technology and ground-based telescopes, we can see faint objects with exquisite resolution and determine how planetary systems form.
